creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to feh from comment #3)
Go to http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/releases/amd64/13.3-RELEASE/, download the tarballs you need (base.txz, kernel.txz and depending on how you installed, lib32.txz and others).

Untar those (as root!) into a temporary directory. (DON'T extract them into your existing root, because files in /etc get overwritten!)

Then you can compare the files by hand, if you like, and selectively restore the ones that are bad.
